text:
There once was a squirrel named Benny. Benny lived high in the tree canopy with his family. Every morning Benny woke up and listened for his favorite sounds—birds tweeting and crickets chirping. He loved listening to them all day long.

One sunny day, Benny decided he wanted to explore something new. He climbed down into the nearby forest. He noticed there were gardens there where humans kept tulips in pots. Benny examined them carefully, listening to how each petal moved. He thought he could maybe pretend they were flowers.

As the sun was going down, Benny climbed back up into Benny Hill's tree. Benny thought about his adventure. That night, he dreamed of flowers dancing and singing songs. Benny woke up smiling thinking about it all. He decided to go explore that garden tomorrow. Benny chuckled to himself and felt happy. He had found a whole new world out here.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
